about.title: About Us
about.text1: MUDROCH MOTORWORXX is a professional car service located in Bratislava - Podunajské Biskupice.
about.text2: We specialize in comprehensive care for your vehicle - from regular service to special modifications and tuning.
about.text3: Our priority is quality work, customer satisfaction and fair prices.

seo.title: Professional Car Service Bratislava
seo.description: MUDROCH MOTORWORXX - professional car service in Bratislava. Service, diagnostics, brake replacement, shock absorbers, inspection preparation and more. Call: 0944 122 224
